channel.title: Shanios Blog
channel.description: Engineering breakdowns, release notes, and stories from the team building India

item.title: Why Your OS Update Should Never Break Your Computer — And How Shanios Fixes This
item.description: Every server admin knows: you never update the live system. You update the standby, verify it, then switch. Desktops never got this lesson — until now.
item.author: Shrinivas Kumbhar
